rule_metadata.name: susp_winsvc_upx
rule_metadata.description: broad hunt for any PE exporting ServiceMain API and upx packed
rule_metadata.author: SBousseaden

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule susp_winsvc_upx
{
	meta:
		description = "broad hunt for any PE exporting ServiceMain API and upx packed"
		author = "SBousseaden"
		date = "2019-01-28"

	strings:
		$upx1 = {55505830000000}
		$upx2 = {55505831000000}
		$upx_sig = "UPX!"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and $upx1 in ( 0 .. 1024 ) and $upx2 in ( 0 .. 1024 ) and $upx_sig in ( 0 .. 1024 ) and pe.exports ( "ServiceMain" )
}
